items.h: Maya World Has Eyes On ROH Champion
items.p: Maya World has been on a tear in the ring after suffering a huge loss outside of it. She has a new goal after AEW's Owen Hart Foundation Cup tournament.

items.p: Chris Jericho has detailed the great lengths he went to in order to keep his AEW return a surprise, with his father also playing a role.

items.h: Brian Cage Details Goals In And Out Of AEW
items.p: Brian Cage could be considered an AEW veteran at this point, but "The Machine" still has goals and aspirations for his AEW career.
